tools.name: geocode_address
tools.description: Forward or reverse geocoding using OpenStreetMap Nominatim. Forward: convert an address to lat/lon. Reverse: convert lat/lon to an address.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Current weather and multi-day forecast for any location. Provide coordinates or a city name.

tools.name: get_timezone
tools.description: Get timezone and country information by coordinates, country code/name, or IP address.
